expectations.text: Agent challenges the claim that everything changes
expectations.evidence: REJECTED: 'that changes everything'. Core drivers unchanged.

expectations.text: Agent does NOT just accept the PO's request and rewrite
expectations.evidence: Each claim individually evaluated and challenged

expectations.text: Agent asks for concrete evidence or justification
expectations.evidence: Challenged dropping Performance, required concrete IoT targets

expectations.text: Agent recommends incremental changes rather than wholesale restructuring
expectations.evidence: Added Fault Tolerance incrementally, kept Performance, ran verification
